checks.finding: Still a latest-day full-market snapshot with no historical depth; rejection for P5 bulk stands.
Still an interactive per-date per-security-code query surface; no bounded all-market bulk contract.
Daily OHLCV fields, start date 1992-01-04, files TWT62U/TWT69U/TWTA5U, monthly subscription with cart checkout; paid product, rejected under the free-only boundary.
Free daily OHLCV dataset metadata under government open-data license v1; confirms daily fields only, not three-year bulk coverage.
Still candidate only; digest and same-work-unit version binding remain pending capture at activation.

decision_options.summary: Amend the free-only product boundary to admit the paid Daily Quotes subscription.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend docs/tqe-product-boundary.md and approve purchase and license review.

decision_options.summary: Reduce the three-year history goal so the free latest-day snapshot accumulates history going forward.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend workflow/tqe-p5-history-admission.json history_window and the P5 acceptance checklist.

decision_options.summary: Amend the execution contract to allow an explicitly bounded per-trading-day capture loop (about 750 sessions) against the official free daily report endpoint, driven by the pre-approved calendar session list.
decision_options.required_human_approval: User approval to amend the request budget and work-unit shape, plus a fresh P5.1 contract pass for the chosen endpoint.

decision_options.summary: Keep P5.1 blocked and wait for a free official bounded bulk artifact.

next_action.action: Choose one decision_option (A, B, C, or D); P5 execution remains blocked until the user selects an option and the corresponding amendments are approved.

acceptance_notes: The blocked status is preserved; no candidate was admitted and no source ID was added to the provider registry.
No provider call was made by the repository during re-verification; only read-only public web pages were consulted.
P5.2 remains pass; P5.1 and activation-ready P5.3 remain blocked pending a human decision.
The paid Daily Quotes product is recorded as technically suitable but outside the free-only product boundary; it is not activated by this record.
